metadata.og:title: ONLAYS - Dr. Brien Hsu
metadata.og:description: What are onlays? An onlay is a covering that encases part(s) of a tooth surface(s) restoring it to its original shape and size; this restoration protects and strengthens tooth structure. An onlay is diagnosed, when a tooth is too far broken down to be restored by a filling and yet not broken down far enough […]
